entities.name: ConversationEndExecutor
entities.context: A tool used to execute proposals in the context of V's knowledge system.

entities.name: proposal_path
entities.context: A concept representing the path to the proposal being executed.

entities.name: result
entities.context: The outcome of executing the proposal.

relationships.context: V uses the ConversationEndExecutor to execute proposals.
V knows about the proposal_path used in executing the proposal.
V knows the result obtained after executing the proposal.
